parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Melihat File Disposisi BKD

actor Kepala
boundary Dashboard_V
boundary DisposisiBKD_V
boundary PDF_V
control Admin_C
control SuratDisposisi_C
entity SuratDisposisi_E

Admin_C --> Dashboard_V : 1 load->view()
Dashboard_V --> Kepala : 2 Halaman Dashboard
Kepala --> Dashboard_V : 3 klik menu Disposisi BKD
Dashboard_V --> SuratDisposisi_C : 4 disposisibkd()
SuratDisposisi_C --> SuratDisposisi_E : 5
SuratDisposisi_E --> SuratDisposisi_C : 6
SuratDisposisi_C --> DisposisiBKD_V : 7 load->view()
DisposisiBKD_V --> Kepala : 8 Halaman Disposisi BKD
Kepala --> DisposisiBKD_V : 9 klik tombol Lihat File Disposisi BKD
DisposisiBKD_V --> SuratDisposisi_C : 10 viewdisposisimail()
SuratDisposisi_C --> SuratDisposisi_E : 11
SuratDisposisi_E --> SuratDisposisi_C : 12
SuratDisposisi_C --> PDF_V : 13 load->view()
PDF_V --> Kepala : 14 Tampilan file Disposisi BKD

@enduml
```
